reason: Successfully tested agent chat functionality - agent correctly answered "2+2=4"
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded with sidebar showing three agents
Found and clicked agent "QA-20260319-203514-6iq4" in sidebar — Agent detail page opened
Verified agent status "idle" — Status indicator shows "idle" in blue
Clicked message input and typed "Hello! What is 2+2?" — Message text entered in input field
Clicked send button — Message submitted, agent status changed to "working"
Waited up to 3 minutes for response — Agent responded in 3 seconds with "4."
Verified response mentions "4" — Response clearly shows "4." as the correct answer to the math question
